allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'{d[\\"name\\"]:30s} {d[\\"type\\"]}'\) for d in data]")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for item in data.get\('tree', []\): path = item['path'] if 'plugin.json' in path or \(path.endswith\('README.md'\) and '/' in path\): print\(path\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for item in data.get\('tree', []\): print\(item['path']\) ")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(d['name']\) for d in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(d['name'],d['type']\) for d in data]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(d['name']\) for d in data]")
